one_line_summary: Exemplary submission: ADR-first, real `duh tdd` subcommand reusing run_agent/SessionBuilder, thorough phase tests, and coherent docs.
strengths: ADR-076 clearly defines Driver/Navigator contract, alternatives, and RED retry semantics
Orchestrator reuses run_agent, SessionBuilder, and Bash tool instead of reinventing infrastructure
Tests cover phase order, RED≠GREEN distinction, refactor-before-validate, and end-to-end stub flow
weaknesses: Integration test depends on real SessionBuilder which may be brittle across environments
`format_tdd_result` response preview truncation is minor polish
Navigator tools include edit tools despite 'never edits' contract — enforced only by prompt
